nasb.text: They said, “Lord, look, here are two swords.” And He said to them, “It is enough.”

esv.text: And they said, “Look, Lord, here are two swords.” And he said to them, “It is enough.”

cnv.text: 他們說：“主啊，請看，這裡有兩把刀。”耶穌說：“夠了。”

ccb.text: 他们说：“主啊，请看，这里有两把刀。”耶稣说：“够了。”

csbs.text: 他们说：“主啊，你看，这里有两把刀。” 耶稣说：“实在够了。”
